title: Mugget's Flying Golems
description: This small pack changes the iron golem's model and texture (and animations) to give it a steampunk theme/vibe.
body:
# Mugget's Flying Golems

 _This small pack changes the iron golem's model and texture (and animations) to give it a steampunk theme/vibe._

 _The Iron Golems have. 50% chance of spawning with some little goggles._

## *Requires EMF/ETF or OptiFine to work
![Flying Golem GIF](https://i.postimg.cc/0NVNX4fV/iron-golem2.gif)
